mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(r.id) FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id
AND (LOWER(r.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(r.address) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%'))
AND LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
AND (
LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{p}), '%')
OR
LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{c}), '%')
)

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id
AND (LOWER(r.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(r.address) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%'))
AND LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
AND (
LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{p}), '%')
OR
LOWER(r.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{c}), '%')
)
ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{userId}, #{point}, #{reviewStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id AS userId, r.point, r.review_status AS reviewStatus, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.login_id AS loginId FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id AS userId, r.point, r.review_status AS reviewStatus, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM review r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 4
